calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Continued To Jan-13-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Department 218 this date for settlement conference.
Appearances: Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. for plaintiff Norman C. Buckhart Trustee of the Norman C. Buckhart Trust. No other appearances. There being no appaearance by defendant, Ryan Montgomery, this matter is ordered off calendar and the jury trial is stricken.
